data.title: Bank of America Economists Rule Out Rate Cut in 2025, According to the Trillion-Dollar Lender’s CEO Brian Moynihan – Here’s Why
data.description:
Bank of America’s economists are predicting that the Fed will not cut rates this year, according to the lender’s CEO Brian Moynihan. In a new CNBC interview, Moynihan says that the bank’s economists believe inflation pressures will cause the Fed to hold off cutting rates until 2026 as the economy remains healthy.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/07/bank-of-america-economists-rule-out-rate-cut-in-2025-according-to-the-trillion-dollar-lenders-ceo-brian-moynihan-heres-why/

data.title: BoE’s governor Bailey says he’s saddened by Trump’s attacks on his ‘friend’ Powell
data.description:
Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey said he was “saddened” by how U. S. President Donald Trump has kept going after Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. During a press briefing in London today, Bailey said, “Jay Powell is a dear friend of mine – obviously, we are very close, we work very closely together. He is […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bailey-saddened-by-trumps-attacks-on-powell/

data.title: OpenAI Launches Enhanced GPT-5 Model for Programming and Writing
data.description: According to BlockBeats, OpenAI has unveiled its latest GPT-5 model, designed to improve capabilities in programming and writing. This new version aims to offer enhanced performance and efficiency, building on the advancements of its predecessors. The release marks a significant step in AI development, providing users with more powerful tools for various applications.

data.title: Trump Greenlights Alternative Assets in 401(k) Plans
data.description:
Former President Donald Trump has officially approved the inclusion of alternative assets in 401(k) retirement plans, allowing individuals to diversify their investment portfolios beyond traditional stocks and bonds. This significant policy change aims to provide savers with greater flexibility and opportunities for growth by enabling them to incorporate assets such as real estate, cryptocurrencies, and private equity into their retirement savings strategies.
source: https://blocknews.com/trump-greenlights-alternative-assets-in-401k-plans/

data.title: Trump signs order opening 401(k)s to crypto and private equity
data.description:
Trump has signed off on a sweeping executive order to allow crypto, private equity, and real estate deals inside 401(k) retirement accounts. This clears the way for about $9 trillion in American retirement savings to be funneled into riskier, less liquid assets, and it’s already shaking up how retirement plans will be built from here […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-signs-order-opening-401ks-to-crypto/
